architecture.comment: Clear Streamlit-based architecture with proper separation of concerns. Component diagrams and data flows are well-documented.

implementation.comment: Detailed module breakdown including API Client, Chat Module, and Upload Module. Code examples provided.

timeline.comment: Realistic 7-day timeline with clear milestones. Phases are well-structured.

risks.comment: Good risk identification with mitigation strategies. Could add more detail on fallback scenarios.

overall.comment: Comprehensive implementation plan suitable for T058 RAG Web UI development.

improvements: Add more detail on error handling
